evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about on-call rotation design
evals.prompt: How should I set up an on-call rotation for my team of 6 engineers?

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about running a post-mortem
evals.prompt: We had a production outage last night. How do I run a post-mortem?

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about war room coordination
evals.prompt: We have a SEV1 incident right now. How do I run the war room?

evals.description: Agent can produce a runbook structure for an alert
evals.prompt: Write a runbook for a high CPU alert on our payment service

evals.description: Agent correctly classifies incident severity levels
evals.prompt: Our checkout page is returning 500 errors for about 20% of users. What severity is this?

evals.description: Agent provides correct status page communication guidance
evals.prompt: How should I communicate a partial outage to customers on our status page?

evals.description: Agent can design an escalation policy
evals.prompt: Design an escalation policy for our engineering team's incident response

evals.description: Agent provides post-mortem action item guidance with correct format
evals.prompt: How should I write action items for a post-mortem?
Our developer John caused the outage by deploying bad code. How do I address this in the post-mortem?

evals.description: Agent identifies unsustainable on-call as a problem
evals.prompt: Our on-call engineer got paged 15 times last week. Is that normal?

evals.description: Agent does not invent incident management tools or APIs
evals.prompt: What is the standard IncidentManager.createWarRoom() API call?

evals.description: Agent does not confuse incident management with SLO definition
evals.prompt: Help me define SLOs for my payment service

evals.description: Agent references the postmortem template file when asked for details
evals.prompt: Give me a detailed post-mortem template I can use for our next incident review
